messages.title: ▼// Prepare Gift Codes Announcement
messages.description: Use the options below to prepare a message containing multiple gift codes. Once you're ready, click the Send Message button to post it in the selected channel.
messages.enterCodesDesc: Enter one code per line. You can add up to 24 codes in total.
messages.noCodesDesc: You need to add at least one code before sending the message.
messages.noChannelDesc: Please select a target channel first.
messages.missingPermsDesc: I don't have permission to send messages in the selected channel.
messages.missingPermsDetailedDesc: I don't have enough permissions (view/send/embed) in the selected channel.
messages.postedDescription:
**REMINDER**: These codes are limited! Claim them before they expire!

{codes}
messages.expiredOrNoCodes: This message expired or has no codes stored.
messages.noRedeemCodesDesc: There are no codes to redeem on this message.
messages.noAccountDesc: You need to link an account first with `/accounts`.
messages.missingTokenDesc: Could not find a valid u8 token for your account. Please reauthorize with `/reauth`.
messages.uidUnavailable: Unable to determine account UID for code redemption.
messages.missingGrantToken: Unable to obtain U8 grant token.
messages.sessionExpired: Session expired, please run the command again.
